purpose: Codex local H5 agent executable skill bundle

component_execution.role: component selection, HTML structure, cut hints, quality rules

theme_execution.role: KV style contract, module visual plan

slicing_execution.role: slice planning, module-boundary cut strategy, reference band budget

generation_prompt_execution.role: Image2 segment prompt contract, continuity wording, prompt quality rules

archives.note: Original user-provided skills are kept for traceability only. They are not execution inputs for the current local Agent.

prototype: Render HTML with data-section, data-component, data-no-cut and data-cut-after
slicing: Reserve reference band height before Image2 continuation
generation_prompt: Read theme_execution outputs as mandatory prompt inputs
Use prototype slices as layout references
Use KV/style contract as visual references
Merge module_visual_plan into each segment prompt
Describe continuation strips without visible pixel numbers
